# Roots Deep Tattoo — Salem, OR
> Roots Deep Tattoo is a licensed tattoo studio in Salem, Oregon offering custom tattoos, cover-ups, and bilingual (English/Spanish) service. 2017 25th St SE. Call (503) 385-1005. Book a free consult.

## Services
- Custom tattoos
- Cover-ups
- Fine-line & blackwork
- Flash & walk-ins

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97302)

## Contact
- Call/text: (503) 385-1005 · Hours: Mon 11–5 · Tue–Sat 12–5 · Sun closed · Languages: English, Español
